allButtonLabels: Be world-classWe choose the harder craft when it makes the product feel simpler for customers.
Share everythingOpen context keeps teams moving without waiting for permission or perfect certainty.
Take responsibilityEvery project has one owner, one path to decision, and a clear next commit.
Always learningResearch, experiments, and customer evidence shape the next version of the work.
Move deliberatelyFast work still needs thoughtful sequencing, real QA, and visible accountability.
Enjoy downtimeSustainable teams protect attention so the best ideas have room to develop.
